info.description:
Code-first Swagger docs for the current Clawflux HTTP API.

Auth behavior:
- Most /v1 endpoints accept either X-API-Key or X-User-Email.
- DEVELOPMENT_AUTH=true allows unauthenticated local requests as developer@local.
- Platform admin endpoints additionally require X-Platform-Admin: true.
info.title: Clawflux API
